Baby-SpiCroft

A Raspberry Pi Smart Speaker Baby Monitor Built on Open Source

Posted on March 26, 2022

In the months leading up to the birth of our first child, my partner and I were beginning to nest. She was busy procuring critical, practical items like clothing, bottles, and toys; I, on the other hand, was busy selfishly scheming a new personal project that would consume the little... [Read More]
